data.title: Perry Capital Acquires Elmwood Reclaimed Timber, Building a National Platform for Premium Wood Products and Custom Furnishings
data.description: Perry Capital LLC has recently completed the acquisition of Elmwood Reclaimed Timber, a well-known reclaimed wood manufacturer. This move merges Elmwood with KC Custom Hardwoods, expanding their scope in the luxury wood products market. The combined entity will now cater to architects, designers, builders, and homeowners across the country, offering a wider range of offerings. This acquisition signifies a strategic development in the industry, with significant implications for those involved.

data.title: Global Brokerage The Agency Launches Office in Missoula, Montana
data.description: Global real estate brokerage The Agency is expanding its presence in the Mountain West region with the opening of its third office in Montana. The latest office, located in Missoula, was launched on April 28, 2026. This marks a significant milestone for the brokerage as it continues to grow its footprint in the state. The Agency now operates three offices in Montana, demonstrating its commitment to the region. The expansion highlights the brand's successful growth strategy and emphasizes its focus on serving clients in the Mountain West.

data.title: NetZoom Visio Stencils Library Adds Over 1000 Network, Data Center and A/V Stencils
data.description: NetZoom® announced an expansion in its NetZoom Visio Stencils Device library during the first quarter of 2026. Over 1000 customer-requested devices were added along with 26 new manufacturers. This growth includes network, data center infrastructure devices, and AV equipment. The news was revealed in Chicago on April 28, 2026.

data.title: San Diego Brand Eau Vodka Introduces Lightweight Water-Inspired Bottle Designed for Portability
data.description: A new water-inspired bottle format has been introduced by San Diego's Eau Vodka, offering a lightweight and portable alternative to standard glass vodka packaging. Emphasizing mobility, simplicity, and contemporary convenience, the product was launched in San Diego on April 28, 2026. The compact design allows for easy transport in a tote or similar carry-on, catering to the modern consumer's needs.

data.title: Century Complete Announces New Homes Coming Soon to Fleming Island, FL
data.description: Fleming Island Estates is set to showcase top-notch single-family residences offering convenient proximity to Jacksonville. Key points: An opportunity to acquire budget-friendly new homes in Fleming Island, FL. These single-family homes are priced starting from the $320,000s, which is 25% lower than the area's median sale price of $429,467 as reported by Zillow. The Grand Opening...

data.title: Corporate Technologies Acquires RPM Technologies to Expand Life Sciences Expertise and National Reach
data.description: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota on April 28, 2026, Corporate Technologies revealed their acquisition of RPM Technologies, LLC. Corporate Technologies, a prominent national managed IT services and cybersecurity provider catering to small and mid-sized businesses, has acquired RPM Technologies, LLC, a renowned managed services provider recognized for its strong proficiency in the industry.

data.title: Bison Continues to Expand in New York
data.description: Bison Wealth, based in Atlanta, is bolstering its operations in New York by welcoming Gregory Owsiany, an accomplished portfolio manager formerly responsible for managing around $1.3 billion in client assets at BNY. This strategic move reflects Bison's commitment to leveraging experienced professionals to facilitate its continuous growth in the financial sector.
Treasury's OFAC: Firms making toll payments to Iran for passage through the Strait of Hormuz face significant sanctions.
US Treasury's Bessent: Illicit funds funneled by designated individuals, entities supported Iran's terrorist operations.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Any institution that facilitates or engages with Iran's shadow banking network is at risk of severe consequences.
US Treasury: Imposing sanctions on 35 Iranian entities and individuals for aiding sanctions evasion.
Treasury Department sanctions some Hong Kong companies over Iran ties.

data.title: The Ivory Debuts in Koreatown
data.description: A modern boutique hospitality experience in Los Angeles is being transformed by a new concept. Situated in Koreatown, The Ivory is a 48-room boutique hideaway redefining the city's hotel scene. Launching on April 28, 2026, this intimate hotel offers a unique accommodation experience.
Apple plans photo-editing overhaul with AI in I0S 27 this year, with the company improving photo features in a bid to catch up with Android. $AAPL

data.title: XGIMI TITAN Noir Series Surpasses $10 Million in Kickstarter Funding Following Strong Global Launch
data.description: XGIMI, a renowned global leader in advanced smart projection and home entertainment systems, has unveiled their latest flagship lineup in New York on April 28, 2026. This cutting-edge series debuts the pioneering Dual Intelligent Iris System and offers unparalleled cinematic 4K performance tailored for expansive home entertainment setups. This innovation caters to tech-savvy consumers seeking top-notch visual experiences, further solidifying XGIMI's position in the market.

data.title: ReelTime's Annual Financials Reveal Major Capital Structure Improvements Designed to Protect Shareholder Value and Reduce Potential Dilution
data.description: Approximately 685 million possible shares have been decreased or eliminated, maintaining a stable share count since July 2025. ReelTime emphasizes debt reduction, disciplined dilution, and prudent capital management in the artificial intelligence sector, dominated by Microsoft, NVIDIA, and Alphabet.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement
data.description: Houston, April 21, 2026 - Plus Therapeutics, Inc., a healthcare company traded on the Nasdaq under the symbol PSTV, has disclosed that it is focused on developing and distributing precision diagnostics and radiopharmaceuticals for central nervous system cancers. Recently, the company revealed that it received notification from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC indicating that it has met the minimum bid price requirement outlined in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2), ensuring compliance.

data.title: VEON’s Banglalink to Bring Starlink Mobile to Customers in Bangladesh
data.description: VEON and Starlink Mobile have formed a partnership to provide direct-to-device satellite connectivity to users in Bangladesh, marking it as the third market for this service. This collaboration aims to offer a reliable and innovative communication solution to users in the country. Bangladesh joins two other markets in this initiative.
